text:
M
Baghal-e-dariya se hai ae qatra-e-betaab tu
Pehle
Gohar tha, bana ab gohar-e-nayaab tu
Aah
Khola kis ada se tu ne raaz-e-rang-o-boo
Mein
Abhi tak hoon aseer-e-imtiaz-e-rang-o-boo
Mit
Ke ghogha-e-zindagi ka shorish-e-mahshar bana
Yeh
Sharara bujh ke aatish-khana-e-Azar bana
Nafi
Hasti ik karishma hai dil-e-aagah ka
'
La
'
Ke darya mein nihan moti hai 'Illallah' ka
Chashm
Nabeena se makhfi maani-e-anjaam hai
Tham
Gayi jis dam tadap, seemaab seem-e-khaam hai
Tod
Deta hai but-e-hasti ko Ibrahim-e-ishq
Hosh
Ka daroo hai goya masti-e-tasneem-e-ishq
